## Summary

Describe the change and the user-facing effect.

## Definition of done

- [ ] Scope is focused and the behavior change is clear.
- [ ] Tests were added or updated when behavior changed.
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes.
- [ ] `npm test` passes.
- [ ] README/docs were updated when commands, tools, or workflows changed.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` was updated for user-visible changes.

## Verification

List the commands you ran and their results.

```text
npm run typecheck
npm test
```

## Golden-task / verifier impact

- [ ] No impact
- [ ] Golden-task playback changed
- [ ] Verifier or validator behavior changed

Explain any checked impact above, including new fixtures or residual risk.
